'''Tel III''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Tel Minor system/Legends|Tel Minor system]], located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==Geography==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was a ball of ash-covered rock which was crumbling to dust as it aged. Because of the planet's location within the planetary [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]], the skies of Tel III were greenish in [[Color/Legends|color]].<ref name="FBS" />

==History==
This remote planet was the location of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Oracle Base]], established shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="FBS" />

{{Planet-stub}}
